__inputs.name: DS_CLICKHOUSE
__inputs.label: ClickHouse
__inputs.description: ClickHouse datasource pointing to the ntopng database

description: Per-flow bidirectional throughput at 15-second granularity using ntopng nProbe HR_SRC2DST_BYTES / HR_DST2SRC_BYTES arrays from the ClickHouse flows table. Filter by source IP, destination IP, and destination port.

panels.description: Bidirectional throughput in bits per second. Each point is a 15-second nProbe HR slot (or the Grafana auto-interval when that is wider). The HR arrays are unnested via ARRAY JOIN; slot timestamps are reconstructed from toStartOfMinute(FIRST_SEEN) + (slot_index - 1) * 15s. Multiple flow records for the same tuple within the time range are summed.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT
    toDateTime(intDiv(toUnixTimestamp(toStartOfMinute(FIRST_SEEN)) + toInt64(slot_idx - 1) * 15, greatest($__interval_s, 15)) * greatest($__interval_s, 15)) AS time,
    'Src2Dst' AS metric,
    sum(arrayElement(HR_SRC2DST_BYTES, slot_idx)) * 8 / greatest($__interval_s, 15) AS bps
FROM ${db}.flows
ARRAY JOIN arrayEnumerate(arrayResize(HR_SRC2DST_BYTES, greatest(length(HR_SRC2DST_BYTES), length(HR_DST2SRC_BYTES)), toUInt64(0))) AS slot_idx
WHERE (notEmpty('${src_ip}') = 0 OR IPV4_SRC_ADDR = IPv4StringToNum(if(notEmpty('${src_ip}'), '${src_ip}', '0.0.0.1')))
  AND (notEmpty('${dst_ip}') = 0 OR IPV4_DST_ADDR = IPv4StringToNum(if(notEmpty('${dst_ip}'), '${dst_ip}', '0.0.0.1')))
  AND (notEmpty('${dst_port}') = 0 OR IP_DST_PORT = toUInt16(if(notEmpty('${dst_port}'), '${dst_port}', '0')))
  AND $__timeFilter(FIRST_SEEN)
  AND greatest(length(HR_SRC2DST_BYTES), length(HR_DST2SRC_BYTES)) > 0
GROUP BY time
UNION ALL
SELECT
    toDateTime(intDiv(toUnixTimestamp(toStartOfMinute(FIRST_SEEN)) + toInt64(slot_idx - 1) * 15, greatest($__interval_s, 15)) * greatest($__interval_s, 15)) AS time,
    'Dst2Src' AS metric,
    sum(arrayElement(HR_DST2SRC_BYTES, slot_idx)) * 8 / greatest($__interval_s, 15) AS bps
FROM ${db}.flows
ARRAY JOIN arrayEnumerate(arrayResize(HR_SRC2DST_BYTES, greatest(length(HR_SRC2DST_BYTES), length(HR_DST2SRC_BYTES)), toUInt64(0))) AS slot_idx
WHERE (notEmpty('${src_ip}') = 0 OR IPV4_SRC_ADDR = IPv4StringToNum(if(notEmpty('${src_ip}'), '${src_ip}', '0.0.0.1')))
  AND (notEmpty('${dst_ip}') = 0 OR IPV4_DST_ADDR = IPv4StringToNum(if(notEmpty('${dst_ip}'), '${dst_ip}', '0.0.0.1')))
  AND (notEmpty('${dst_port}') = 0 OR IP_DST_PORT = toUInt16(if(notEmpty('${dst_port}'), '${dst_port}', '0')))
  AND $__timeFilter(FIRST_SEEN)
  AND greatest(length(HR_SRC2DST_BYTES), length(HR_DST2SRC_BYTES)) > 0
GROUP BY time
) ORDER BY time, metric

panels.title: Service Flow Throughput — ${src_ip} → ${dst_ip}:${dst_port}

panels.description: Total bidirectional throughput in bits per second grouped by application protocol name, across all flows and all hosts/ports in the selected time range. Protocol names are resolved via the l7_protocols lookup table populated at ntopng startup. Each point is a 15-second HR slot; both directions are summed per protocol.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    toDateTime(intDiv(toUnixTimestamp(toStartOfMinute(FIRST_SEEN)) + toInt64(slot_idx - 1) * 15, greatest($__interval_s, 15)) * greatest($__interval_s, 15)) AS time,
    if(p.PROTO_NAME != '', p.PROTO_NAME, toString(L7_PROTO_MASTER)) AS metric,
    sum(arrayElement(HR_SRC2DST_BYTES, slot_idx) + arrayElement(HR_DST2SRC_BYTES, slot_idx)) * 8 / greatest($__interval_s, 15) AS bps
FROM ${db}.flows
LEFT JOIN ${db}.l7_protocols AS p ON p.PROTO_ID = L7_PROTO_MASTER
ARRAY JOIN arrayEnumerate(arrayResize(HR_SRC2DST_BYTES, greatest(length(HR_SRC2DST_BYTES), length(HR_DST2SRC_BYTES)), toUInt64(0))) AS slot_idx
WHERE $__timeFilter(FIRST_SEEN)
  AND greatest(length(HR_SRC2DST_BYTES), length(HR_DST2SRC_BYTES)) > 0
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time, metric

panels.title: Application Protocol Throughput (All Traffic)

title: ntopng High-Resolution Charts
